option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <size android:width="10dp" android:height="10dp" /> <solid android:color="#2C3E50" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <size android:width="10dp" android:height="10dp" /> <solid android:color="#BFCBD6" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Background --> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:navigationIconTint="#2A5298" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:shadowColor="#FFFFFF" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" android:shadowRadius="8" android:text="@string/title_selection" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/selection_instruction" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSelectionStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/selection_status_initial" android:textColor="#3D4E5F" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingBottom="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/selectedStripCard" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSelectionStatus" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/selectedStripCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#CCFFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/buttonContainer" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSelectedStripTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/selected_strip_title" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvClearSelection" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="@string/clear_selection" android:textColor="#E74C3C" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvSelectedPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="100dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:overScrollMode="ifContentScrolls" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/buttonContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/btn_edit" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#ff99be" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDirectToResult" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/btn_result" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Background --> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:navigationIcon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:navigationIconTint="#2A5298" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:shadowColor="#FFFFFF" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" android:shadowRadius="8" android:text="@string/title_selection" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="@string/selection_instruction" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnHelpSelection" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHelpSelection" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:text="?" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:contentDescription="@string/help_selection_content_desc" app:backgroundTint="#CCFFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="18dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/tvSubtitle" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSelectionStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/selection_status_initial" android:textColor="#3D4E5F" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingBottom="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/selectedStripCard" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSelectionStatus" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/selectedStripCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#CCFFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/buttonContainer" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSelectedStripTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/selected_strip_title" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvClearSelection" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="@string/clear_selection" android:textColor="#E74C3C" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvSelectedPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="100dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:overScrollMode="ifContentScrolls" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/buttonContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/btn_edit" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#ff99be" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDirectToResult" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/btn_result" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="#FFFFFF" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="36dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="24dp" app:iconTint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<!-- PHẦN CỐ ĐỊNH PHÍA TRÊN --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/setup_title" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/setup_subtitle" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/togglePhotoCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnCount4" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCount4" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="130dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:text="@string/setup_count_4" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCount6" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="130dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:text="@string/setup_count_6" android:textStyle="bold" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- PHẦN CHỈ ĐỊNH CUỘN: RecyclerView --> <!-- Quan trọng: layout_height="0dp" để nó chiếm khoảng không ở giữa và tự scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvConcepts" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingBottom="20dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/togglePhotoCount" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnNext" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- PHẦN CỐ ĐỊNH PHÍA DƯỚI --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" android:layout_width="200dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:text="@string/btn_next_decorated" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#ff99be" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="36dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="24dp" app:iconTint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHelpSetup" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:text="?" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:contentDescription="@string/help_setup_content_desc" app:backgroundTint="#CCFFFFFF" app:cornerRadius="20dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- PHẦN CỐ ĐỊNH PHÍA TRÊN --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/setup_title" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/setup_subtitle" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<!-- PHẦN CHỈ ĐỊNH CUỘN: RecyclerView --> <!-- Quan trọng: layout_height="0dp" để nó chiếm khoảng không ở giữa và tự scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvConcepts" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingBottom="20dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnNext" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- PHẦN CỐ ĐỊNH PHÍA DƯỚI --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" android:layout_width="200dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="28dp" android:text="@string/btn_next_decorated" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#ff99be" app:cornerRadius="28dp" app:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="#FFFDFEFF" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:strokeColor="#332A5298" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="18dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:layout_width="34dp" android:layout_height="34dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_help_24" android:tint="#2A5298" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHelpTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:fillViewport="true" android:scrollbars="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHelpSubtitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp" android:textColor="#4A5D77" android:textSize="13sp" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rowBullet1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:gravity="top" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:text="•" android:textColor="#FF99BE" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBullet1" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp" android:textColor="#324963" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rowBullet2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:gravity="top" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:text="•" android:textColor="#FF99BE" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBullet2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp" android:textColor="#324963" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rowBullet3" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:gravity="top" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:text="•" android:textColor="#FF99BE" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBullet3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp" android:textColor="#324963" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/rowBullet4" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:gravity="top" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:text="•" android:textColor="#FF99BE" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBullet4" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp" android:textColor="#324963" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGotIt" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:text="@string/help_got_it" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#2A5298" app:cornerRadius="24dp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </FrameLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="camera_permission_required">Camera permission is required</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="video_saved_success">Video da luu vao thu vien!</string> <string name="processing_collage">Dang xu ly anh ghep...</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="title_setup">CHOOSE YOUR FRAME</string> <string name="title_camera">Camera</string> <string name="title_selection">OUR MEMORIES</string> <string name="title_edit">Edit Photo</string> <string name="title_result">Result</string> <string name="btn_edit">EDIT</string> <string name="btn_edit_with_count">EDIT (%1$d)</string> <string name="btn_result">RESULT</string> <string name="btn_result_with_count">RESULT (%1$d/%2$d)</string> <string name="select_enough_for_result">Hay chon du %1$d anh de xuat ket qua</string> <string name="select_one_photo_for_edit">Vui long chon 1 anh de chinh sua</string> <string name="batch_edit_start">Dang chinh sua %1$d anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_completed">Da hoan thanh chinh sua anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_cancelled">Da dung chinh sua hang loat</string> <string name="selected_strip_title">Selected photos</string> <string name="clear_selection">Clear</string> <string name="selection_status_initial">Selected: 0/0</string> <string name="selection_status_none">Selected: 0/%1$d</string> <string name="selection_status_selected">Selected: %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_ready">Ready to capture</string> <string name="capture_status_starting">Starting capture sequence (%1$d photos)</string> <string name="capture_status_next">Prepare for photo %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_countdown">Photo %1$d/%2$d in %3$ds</string> <string name="capture_status_captured">Captured %1$d/%2$d photos</string> <string name="capture_status_done">Done! %1$d photos captured</string> <string name="capture_status_error">Capture interrupted. Please try again.</string> <string name="camera_header_title">Memories</string> <string name="camera_main_title">Smile for Camera</string> <string name="camera_header_subtitle">Elegant Capture Experience</string> <string name="capture_countdown_default">3</string> <string name="btn_start_capturing">START CAPTURING</string> <string name="camera_result_overlay_title">Select your best shot</string> <string name="btn_next_to_edit">Next to Edit</string> <string name="setup_title">Choose Your Frame</string> <string name="setup_subtitle">Select a frame for your photo</string> <string name="setup_count_4">4 photos</string> <string name="setup_count_6">6 photos</string> <string name="btn_next_decorated">✦ NEXT ✦</string> <string name="result_title">Your Result</string> <string name="result_subtitle">Save your memories</string> <string name="btn_save_png_decorated">✦ SAVE PNG ✦</string> <string name="btn_save_video_decorated">✦ SAVE VIDEO ✦</string> <string name="selection_instruction">Choose a photo to enhance or proceed to result</string> <string name="edit_section_presets">Presets</string> <string name="edit_section_filters">Filters</string> <string name="edit_section_frames">Frames</string> <string name="edit_section_stickers">Stickers</string> <string name="edit_preset_cute">Cute</string> <string name="edit_preset_kpop">K-pop</string> <string <string name="edit_filter_soft">Soft</string> <string name="edit_filter_bw">B/W</string> <string name="edit_filter_vintage">Vintage</string> <string name="edit_filter_cool">Cool</string> <string name="edit_filter_warm">Warm</string> <string name="edit_filter_sepia">Sepia</string> <string name="edit_frame_cortis">Cortis</string> <string name="edit_frame_t1">T1</string> <string name="btn_save_return">SAVE & RETURN</string> <string name="btn_start_decorated">✦ START ✦</string> <string name="camera_switch_lens">Switch Camera</string> <string name="camera_flash_toggle">Toggle Flash</string> <string name="camera_flash_on">Flash on</string> <string name="camera_flash_off">Flash off</string> <string name="camera_flash_back_only">Flash is only available on back camera</string> <string name="camera_screen_flash_level_normal">Normal</string> <string name="camera_screen_flash_level_strong">Strong</string> <string name="camera_screen_flash_level_changed">Selfie flash level: %1$s</string> <string name="item_concept_placeholder">Concept</string> <string name="item_frame_placeholder">Frame</string> <string name="item_selected_badge">SELECTED</string> <string name="item_selected_order_placeholder">1</string> <string name="edit_summary_default">Filter: None • Frame: None • Sticker: None</string> <string name="edit_summary_format">Filter: %1$s • Frame: %2$s • Sticker: %3$s</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="camera_permission_required">Camera permission is required</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="video_saved_success">Video đã lưu vào thư viện!</string> <string name="processing_collage">Đang xử lý ảnh ghép...</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="title_setup">CHOOSE YOUR FRAME</string> <string name="title_camera">Camera</string> <string name="title_selection">OUR MEMORIES</string> <string name="title_edit">Edit Photo</string> <string name="title_result">Result</string> <string name="btn_edit">EDIT</string> <string name="btn_edit_with_count">EDIT (%1$d)</string> <string name="btn_result">RESULT</string> <string name="btn_result_with_count">RESULT (%1$d/%2$d)</string> <string name="select_enough_for_result">Hãy chọn đủ %1$d ảnh để xuất kết quả</string> <string name="select_one_photo_for_edit">Vui lòng chọn 1 ảnh để chỉnh sửa</string> <string name="batch_edit_start">Đang chỉnh sửa %1$d ảnh đã chọn</string> <string name="batch_edit_completed">Đã hoàn thành chỉnh sửa ảnh đã chọn</string> <string name="batch_edit_cancelled">Đã dừng chỉnh sửa hàng loạt</string> <string name="selected_strip_title">Selected photos</string> <string name="clear_selection">Clear</string> <string name="selection_status_initial">Selected: 0/0</string> <string name="selection_status_none">Selected: 0/%1$d</string> <string name="selection_status_selected">Selected: %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="selection_limit_reached">Chỉ được chọn tối đa %1$d ảnh</string> <string name="help_setup_content_desc">Hướng dẫn chọn khung</string> <string name="help_selection_content_desc">Hướng dẫn chọn ảnh</string> <string name="help_setup_title">Hướng dẫn chọn khung</string> <string name="help_setup_subtitle">Thiết lập nhanh trước khi vào camera</string> <string name="help_setup_bullet_1">Chọn 1 frame bạn thích để áp dụng cho kết quả cuối.</string> <string name="help_setup_bullet_2">Nhấn NEXT để vào màn camera chụp chuỗi ảnh tự động.</string> <string name="help_setup_bullet_3">App sẽ chụp 6 tấm, sau đó bạn chọn 4 tấm đẹp nhất để xuất RESULT.</string> <string name="help_selection_title">Hướng dẫn chọn ảnh</string> <string name="help_selection_subtitle">Mẹo chọn ảnh nhanh và đúng quy trình</string> <string name="help_selection_bullet_1">Chọn đúng %1$d ảnh đẹp nhất trong danh sách vừa chụp.</string> <string name="help_selection_bullet_2">Nhấn EDIT để chỉnh sửa theo loạt hoặc bỏ qua nếu đã ổn.</string> <string name="help_selection_bullet_3">Nút RESULT chỉ mở khi bạn đã chọn đủ %1$d/%1$d ảnh.</string> <string name="help_got_it">Đã hiểu</string> <string name="capture_status_ready">Ready to capture</string> <string name="capture_status_starting">Starting capture sequence (%1$d photos)</string> <string name="capture_status_next">Prepare for photo %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_countdown">Photo %1$d/%2$d in %3$ds</string> <string name="capture_status_captured">Captured %1$d/%2$d photos</string> <string name="capture_status_done">Done! %1$d photos captured</string> <string name="capture_status_error">Capture interrupted. Please try again.</string> <string name="camera_header_title">Memories</string> <string name="camera_main_title">Smile for Camera</string> <string name="camera_header_subtitle">Elegant Capture Experience</string> <string name="capture_countdown_default">3</string> <string name="btn_start_capturing">START CAPTURING</string> <string name="camera_result_overlay_title">Select your best shot</string> <string name="btn_next_to_edit">Next to Edit</string> <string name="setup_title">Choose Your Frame</string> <string name="setup_subtitle">Select a frame for your photo</string> <string name="setup_count_4">4 photos</string> <string name="setup_count_6">6 photos</string> <string name="btn_next_decorated">✦ NEXT ✦</string> <string name="result_title">Your Result</string> <string <string name="edit_filter_soft">Soft</string> <string name="edit_filter_bw">B/W</string> <string name="edit_filter_vintage">Vintage</string> <string name="edit_filter_cool">Cool</string> <string name="btn_save_return">SAVE & RETURN</string> <string name="btn_start_decorated">✦ START ✦</string> <string name="camera_switch_lens">Switch Camera</string> <string name="camera_flash_toggle">Toggle Flash</string> <string name="camera_flash_on">Flash on</string> <string name="camera_flash_off">Flash off</string> <string name="camera_flash_back_only">Flash is only available on back camera</string> <string name="camera_screen_flash_level_normal">Normal</string> <string name="camera_screen_flash_level_strong">Strong</string> <string name="camera_screen_flash_level_changed">Selfie flash level: %1$s</string> <string name="item_concept_placeholder">Concept</string> <string name="item_frame_placeholder">Frame</string> <string name="item_selected_badge">SELECTED</string> <string name="item_selected_order_placeholder">1</string> <string name="edit_summary_default">Filter: None • Frame: None • Sticker: None</string> <string name="edit_summary_format">Filter: %1$s • Frame: %2$s • Sticker: %3$s</string> </resources>
